objective: Cross-vendor web-search + vision sidecar matrix: WP1 claude outbound web_search translation, WP2 anthropic search executor (OAuth-only, backend-pluggable SidecarPlan), WP3 claude-inbound sidecar auth reachability, WP4 claude vision executor + cap/cache guards, WP5 config+GUI two-sidecar surface with Claude tab override, WP6 docs+closeout. Full CI gate + sol audits per phase.
